# Incorrect kernel names displayed on Perfetto for traces generated by rocprofv2 using Perfetto plugin on multi-stream applications

> **Issue #2553**
> **状态**: closed
> **创建时间**: 2023-10-13T21:44:01Z
> **更新时间**: 2024-03-18T14:43:06Z
> **关闭时间**: 2024-03-18T14:43:06Z
> **作者**: Rmalavally
> **标签**: Under Investigation, 5.7.1, Workaround
> **URL**: https://github.com/ROCm/ROCm/issues/2553

## 标签

- **Under Investigation** (颜色: #0052cc)
- **5.7.1** (颜色: #b60205)
- **Workaround** (颜色: #A1F1A2)

## 描述

Perfetto displays incorrect kernel names for traces generated by rocprofv2 (beta release ROCm 5.7) using the Perfetto plugin on multi-stream applications.

Note that this issue appears only on parallel kernel dispatches.

As a workaround, use rocprofv1 to generate traces for visualizing Perfetto in such cases.

This issue is under investigation and will be fixed in a future release
